Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you've knocked down every enemy, you'll get the chance to execute an {f 0 1 2}All-Out Attack{f 0 1 27} that will deal significant damage to all enemies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Once an All-Out Attack is possible, there will be a prompt asking whether or not you want to initiate it. Press {f 1 3 999} to cancel and {f 1 3 998} to perform an All-Out Attack. Choose wisely depending on the situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you are afflicted with a status ailment, or if you are the only one mobile at the time, then an All-Out Attack cannot be executed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If any party member is afflicted with a status ailment at the time of an All-Out Attack, they will not be able to join in. This will reduce the amount of damage dealt to enemies.[n]{f 1 1}
